title: Automations stop working, then start if updated manually or rebuilt exactly the same?
excerpt: I often have automations stop working in multiple board - I am on pro so shouldnt be an issue of reaching any maximum - I have to go into them pretend to update and save for it to start working again, doing this manually…

posts.author: AlexStuthridge (Alex Stuthridge)
posts.cookedHtml: I often have automations stop working in multiple board - I am on pro so shouldnt be an issue of reaching any maximum - I have to go into them pretend to update and save for it to start working again, doing this manually for all our automations is impossible - I need to be able to trust all automations to work for confidence to use the product, this has happened multiple times this year - can someone help me resolve this issue?

posts.author: Dohafernandez (Doha)
posts.cookedHtml: Im experiencing the same thing, its ridiculous that these issues keep occurring. I have tried updating the automations as well, but they still dont work.

posts.author: NeilWu (NeilWu)
posts.cookedHtml: All my automation stops working today. They are either in processing forever or just failed. Ridiculous
